segments.text: every embarrassing moment in your life is a story to tell if there's something that happened maybe 2 years ago that still haunts you at night and keeps you
up at night think about it in such a way that you are sitting around your friends and family and telling the story of how you fell in the middle of a hallway 2
years down the line picture yourself in that situation use your ability to look out into the future to distance yourself
from the anxiety of the present moment or anxiety of the past memory this is an emotional regulation strategy called the temporal distancing lighten the mood
lighten the heaviness around the embarrassing event it's not that serious think about it
